items.text:
Subject: Spring Career Fair — Volunteer Sign-Up

Dear Computer Science Students,

I'm writing to invite you to volunteer at the Spring Career Fair on Friday, April 17, in the Patterson Center Ballroom. Volunteers will help check in employers and direct attendees between 8:30 AM and 4:00 PM. We'd especially love help from juniors and seniors who've attended past fairs and can answer student questions about the recruitment process.

In return, volunteers receive a $25 dining credit usable at the Patterson Café for two weeks after the event, plus priority early access from 7:30 AM to speak with recruiters before the public opening. If you can only work part of the day, please indicate your available hours on the sign-up form.

To register, please complete the online form on the student portal by Wednesday, April 8. Slots are limited and will be filled in the order received. For questions, contact Ms. Reyes at careers@university.edu.

Best,
Career Services Office

questions.stem: According to the email, what must students do to volunteer at the career fair?

options.A: Submit a written request to Ms. Reyes by April 17.
options.B: Complete the online form on the student portal by April 8.
options.C: Attend a training session at the Patterson Center on April 8.
options.D: Email careers@university.edu to confirm an assigned shift.

questions.explanation: The email states that students should "complete the online form on the student portal by Wednesday, April 8" to register.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who sign up after April 8?

options.A: They will be assigned shorter shifts at the event.
options.B: They will receive a smaller dining credit for the Patterson Café.
options.C: They will be asked to volunteer for the full day.
options.D: They may not be given a volunteer position at the fair.

questions.explanation: The email says slots are limited and filled in the order received, so students who sign up after April 8 may find that all positions have already been claimed.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this email?

options.A: To recruit student volunteers for an upcoming career fair.
options.B: To explain the registration process for recruiters attending the fair.
options.C: To remind seniors to attend the career fair as job seekers.
options.D: To announce a new dining credit program at the Patterson Café.

questions.explanation: The email is a call for student volunteers for the Spring Career Fair, describing the role, the perks, and the registration deadline. The other options describe details that appear in the email but are not its overall purpose.
